title: Proxy Core Overview

classes.name: EvoMapProxy
classes.notes: Orchestrator. start() instantiates all sub-components, builds routes, wraps OUTBOUND_ROUTES to call sync.notifyNewOutbound(). _proxyHttp handles 401/403 by calling lifecycle.reAuthenticate() and retrying.

classes.name: ProxyHttpServer
methods: start(): Promise<{port, url}> — tries ports sequentially, calls writeSettings on success
stop(): Promise<void> — closes server, calls clearSettings()
_handleRequest(req, res): Promise<void> — parses body/query, dispatches via _matchRoute
classes.notes: Pure Node http.Server wrapper. Route keys are 'METHOD /path'. Supports :param segments. DEFAULT_PORT=19820, MAX_PORT_ATTEMPTS=100. Binds to 127.0.0.1 only.

classes.name: LifecycleManager
methods: hello({rotateSecret}): Promise<{ok, nodeId, response}> — POST /a2a/hello, stores node_id/node_secret
reAuthenticate(): Promise<boolean> — up to MAX_REAUTH_ATTEMPTS=2, calls hello({rotateSecret:true}) then heartbeat
heartbeat({_skipReauth}): Promise<{ok, response}> — POST /a2a/heartbeat, handles unknown_node, events batch write, upgrade check
startHeartbeatLoop(intervalMs?): void — default 360s, exponential backoff on failures

classes.name: AuthError
classes.notes: Custom error for auth failures (401/403). Thrown by lifecycle methods.

functions_modules.name: buildRoutes
route_groups: Mailbox: POST /mailbox/send, POST /mailbox/poll, POST /mailbox/ack, GET /mailbox/list, GET /mailbox/status/:id
Asset: POST /asset/validate, POST /asset/fetch, POST /asset/search, POST /asset/submit, GET /asset/submissions
Task: POST /task/subscribe, POST /task/unsubscribe, GET /task/list, POST /task/claim, POST /task/complete, GET /task/metrics
Session: POST /session/create, POST /session/join, POST /session/leave, POST /session/message, POST /session/delegate, POST /session/submit, POST /session/invites/poll, GET /session/list

functions_modules.name: settings module
functions_modules.notes: Reads/writes ~/.evolver/settings.json. Stores {proxy: {url, pid, started_at}}. clearIfStale() kills stale PID entry on server start.

key_relationships: EvoMapProxy composes SyncEngine, TaskMonitor, SkillUpdater, DmHandler, SessionHandler
EvoMapProxy depends_on buildRoutes (passes store, proxyHandlers, taskMonitor, extensions)
ProxyHttpServer depends_on settings module (writeSettings on start, clearSettings on stop, clearIfStale on init)
buildRoutes depends_on MailboxStore, DmHandler, SessionHandler, TaskMonitor
outbound_route_wrapping: EvoMapProxy wraps 12 OUTBOUND_ROUTES to call sync.notifyNewOutbound() after each handler: POST /mailbox/send, /asset/submit, /task/claim, /task/complete, /task/subscribe, /task/unsubscribe, /dm/send, /session/create, /session/join, /session/leave, /session/message, /session/delegate, /session/submit
important_notes: EvoMapProxy is the top-level orchestrator; startProxy() is a convenience factory function
ProxyHttpServer binds to 127.0.0.1 only; port auto-increments from 19820 if in use
LifecycleManager handles GEP-A2A protocol: hello on startup, heartbeat every 6min with backoff
Auth flow: heartbeat/proxy HTTP gets 401/403 -> reAuthenticate() -> hello(rotateSecret:true) -> verify with heartbeat
settings.json at ~/.evolver/settings.json persists proxy URL/PID for client discovery
buildRoutes is a pure factory function (no class); handlers delegate to store or extension handlers
